creator: dwolf@inbox.ru
text:
On server with FreeBSD has been installed freeradius-1.1.8 from ports, then has been removed by me command 'pkg_delete'. But recently there was again necessity to instal this application. Installed from ports:
-----
cd /usr/ports/net/freeradius/
make
make install
-----
'make' has finished with error:
-----
gmake[4]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/net/freeradius/work/freeradius-1.1.8/src/main'
gmake[3]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/net/freeradius/work/freeradius-1.1.8/src'
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/net/freeradius/work/freeradius-1.1.8/src'
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/net/freeradius/work/freeradius-1.1.8'
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/net/freeradius.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/net/freeradius.
-----
The full output of command 'make' has upload out in text file here: http://ifolder.ru/17444155
Sorry that has uploaded file on file exchange service, I have made it because didn't know as it it is possible to send.

How-To-Repeat: To instal freeradius-1.1.8 from ports, to remove its command 'pkg_delete', then again to reinstall it from ports.
